title: Pastel Clearline
description: Ce style utilise la technique classique de la 'ligne claire', caractérisée par des contours uniformes à l'encre noire et des aplats de couleurs sans dégradé. L'esthétique repose sur une palette pastel très lumineuse, associée à des ombres nettes aux tons froids pour créer une atmosphère rétro-futuriste baignée de soleil. Les détails texturaux sont rendus exclusivement par des pointillés et des hachures minutieux.
description_en: This style utilizes the classic 'ligne claire' technique characterized by uniform, thin black ink outlines and flat, unshaded color fills. The aesthetic relies on a pastel, high-key palette paired with sharp, cool-toned cel-shaded shadows to create a sun-drenched, retro-futuristic atmosphere. Textural details are rendered exclusively through meticulous stippling and short hatching rather than painted gradients.
description_fr: Ce style utilise la technique classique de la 'ligne claire', caractérisée par des contours uniformes à l'encre noire et des aplats de couleurs sans dégradé. L'esthétique repose sur une palette pastel très lumineuse, associée à des ombres nettes aux tons froids pour créer une atmosphère rétro-futuriste baignée de soleil. Les détails texturaux sont rendus exclusivement par des pointillés et des hachures minutieux.
prompt: Bande dessinée illustration, ligne claire comic art, defined by crisp, uniform, thin black ink outlines and flat coloring. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. Render the scene with strong, directional, high-noon sunlight creating a high-key exposure. Utilize flat, smooth fills of muted {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}} with absolutely zero gradients, blending, or digital airbrushing. Shadows must be rendered as sharp, hard-edged, cool-toned cel-shaded blocks that contrast sharply against the bright, sunlit surfaces. Integrate touches of {{accent_color}} to break up the predominantly dusty, pastel-toned palette. All subjects and objects possess strictly defined boundaries enclosed by unvarying black ink lines, avoiding any soft transitions, feathered edges, or realistic rendering. Convey material textures—such as grit, cracks, or surface wear—exclusively through sparse black stippling, scattered dots, and precise, short hatching lines drawn directly over the flat color fields. Maintain an infinite depth of field where both immediate foreground elements and distant background structures remain equally sharp, outlined, and in perfect focus. The spatial dynamics rely entirely on overlapping outlined shapes rather than atmospheric perspective, evoking a serene, surreal, and arid retro-futuristic atmosphere characteristic of 1970s European sci-fi graphic novels. ligne claire, bande dessinée, flat colors, thin black outlines, cel-shaded shadows, stippling texture, pastel palette, retro-futuristic comic art, infinite depth of field, ink and wash, clear line art, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

background_prompt: A serene, arid landscape environment rendered in classic ligne claire comic art style, featuring vast open spaces, distant rocky mesas, and sparse desert vegetation. The scenery utilizes flat fills of {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}} with sharp, cool-toned cel-shaded shadows cast by intense directional sunlight. Crisp, thin black ink outlines define every ridge and pebble, with sparse stippling adding texture to the ground. Touches of {{accent_color}} highlight small environmental details under a clear, gradient-free sky.
background_prompt_removebg: A serene, arid landscape environment rendered in classic ligne claire comic art style, featuring vast open spaces, distant rocky mesas, and sparse desert vegetation, transitioning smoothly into a flat {{background_color}} backdrop. The scenery utilizes flat fills of {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}} with sharp, cool-toned cel-shaded shadows cast by intense directional sunlight. Crisp, thin black ink outlines define every ridge and pebble, with sparse stippling adding texture to the ground. Touches of {{accent_color}} highlight small environmental details under a clear, gradient-free sky. A stylized, geometric foreground border drawn in matching thin black ink frames the invisible subject, creating depth against the {{background_color}} surface.
